title: Fully support GitHub Pages and Electron/Capacitor Desktop and Mobile apps examples building

type.name: Feature
type.description: A request, idea, or new functionality

body:
Use all the best practices from https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop to make universal React.js app, that allows to use already existing code in index.js to actually provide visual UI for both add and multiply functions, these are just and example.

GitHub WebPages should provide 2 modes of operation - directly UI on web (SPA), and also downloading the app locally on desktop platforms.

Also we should use best practices from https://github.com/deep-foundation/sdk to also support example application building also for iOS and Android with actual instructions how to test it even without Apple Developer account and so on.

So it is possible to make sure everything working locally, before all required credentials are provided in GitHub Actions, and once they are provided everything should start working with direct deploy to apple/google and other stores.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
